compatibility_matrix:
# Compatibility Matrix

## DIRECT REUSE

| Source B Feature | Source A Component | Compatibility |
| --- | --- | --- |
| API Endpoints (e.g., `/api/list`, `/api/folder-preview`) | PipelineInspector, Inventory, Inspectors | Can use as-is with authentication |
| Token Generation and Validation | AppSettings, AppState | Can use as-is with modifications for React |
| Biometric Authentication | App.tsx | Can use as-is with modifications for React and macOS LocalAuthentication |

## NEEDS WRAPPER

| Source B Function | Source A Component | Wrapper Needed |
| --- | --- | --- |
| File System Operations (e.g., `create-folder`, `rename`, `duplicate`) | FileSystem, Inventory | React wrapper for Python backend calls |
| Authentication Mechanism | App.tsx, PipelineInspector | Python backend call wrapper for React |
| API Endpoints (e.g., `/api/upload`, `/api/paste`, `/api/delete`) | Inspectors, Inventory | React wrapper for Python backend calls |

## CONFLICTS

| Conflict Type | Source B Feature | Source A Component | Conflict Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Naming Conflict | `Artifact` (Source A) vs. `File` (Source B) | ArtifactInspector, Inventory | Different naming conventions for similar concepts |
| State Management Conflict | Session Management (Source B) vs. AppState (Source A) | App.tsx, PipelineInspector | Different state management approaches |
| Data Format Mismatch | JSON Response (Source B) vs. Custom Data Format (Source A) | PipelineInspector, Inventory | Different data formats require transformation |

## NEW GLUE CODE NEEDED

| Glue Code Type | Source B Feature | Source A Component | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| WebSocket Adapter | Real-time Updates (Source B) | PipelineInspector, Inventory | Establish real-time communication between Source A and Source B |
| Authentication Bridge | Biometric Authentication (Source B) | App.tsx | Integrate biometric authentication with Source A's authentication mechanism |
| Data Transformation Layer | JSON Response (Source B) vs. Custom Data Format (Source A) | PipelineInspector, Inventory | Transform data between Source B's JSON response and Source A's custom data format |
| API Gateway | API Endpoints (Source B) | App.tsx, PipelineInspector | Create an API gateway to manage requests between Source A and Source B |
refactor_registry:
```yml
---
tasks:
  - id: CR-001
    title: Project Setup
    description: Set up a new React project with TypeScript and create a FastAPI backend. Initialize the project structure and configure the build process. This task lays the foundation for the entire project.
    input_files: 
    - source-a/package.json
    - source-b/requirements.txt
    output_files: 
    - merged/package.json
    - merged/requirements.txt
    dependencies: []
    estimated_hours: 4
    confidence: 90
    risk_level: LOW

  - id: CR-002
    title: Shared Types Definition
    description: Define shared TypeScript interfaces for the React frontend and FastAPI backend. This includes types for file operations, authentication, and real-time updates. These shared types will ensure consistency across the project.
    input_files: 
    - source-a/types.ts
    output_files: 
    - merged/types.ts
    dependencies: 
    - CR-001
    estimated_hours: 6
    confidence: 80
    risk_level: MEDIUM

  - id: CR-003
    title: Auth Bridge Implementation
    description: Implement an authentication bridge between the React frontend and FastAPI backend using Touch ID. This will involve creating a secure authentication flow and integrating it with the existing Touch ID authentication in Source B.
    input_files: 
    - source-b/auth.py
    output_files: 
    - merged/auth.py
    dependencies: 
    - CR-001
    estimated_hours: 12
    confidence: 70
    risk_level: HIGH

  - id: CR-004
    title: FastAPI Backend Setup
    description: Set up the FastAPI backend with the required API endpoints for file operations. This includes implementing CRUD operations and integrating the authentication bridge.
    input_files: 
    - source-b/endpoints.py
    output_files: 
    - merged/endpoints.py
    dependencies: 
    - CR-003
    estimated_hours: 10
    confidence: 80
    risk_level: MEDIUM

  - id: CR-005
    title: API Endpoints Implementation
    description: Implement the remaining API endpoints for the FastAPI backend, including those for real-time updates and file syntax highlighting.
    input_files: 
    - source-b/endpoints.py
    output_files: 
    - merged/endpoints.py
    dependencies: 
    - CR-004
    estimated_hours: 15
    confidence: 75
    risk_level: MEDIUM

  - id: CR-006
    title: React Components Integration
    description: Integrate the React components from Source A into the new project, ensuring they work seamlessly with the FastAPI backend.
    input_files: 
    - source-a/components/
    output_files: 
    - merged/components/
    dependencies: 
    - CR-002
    estimated_hours: 12
    confidence: 85
    risk_level: MEDIUM

  - id: CR-007
    title: WebSocket Integration
    description: Implement real-time WebSocket updates between the React frontend and FastAPI backend, enabling live updates and notifications.
    input_files: 
    - source-b/websocket.py
    output_files: 
    - merged/websocket.py
    dependencies: 
    - CR-004
    estimated_hours: 10
    confidence: 80
    risk_level: MEDIUM

  - id: CR-008
    title: Testing and Debugging
    description: Perform thorough testing and debugging of the integrated project, ensuring all components and features work as expected.
    input_files: 
    - merged/
    output_files: 
    - merged/
    dependencies: 
    - CR-006
    - CR-007
    estimated_hours: 20
    confidence: 70
    risk_level: HIGH

phases:
  - phase: Phase 1: Foundation
    tasks: 
    - CR-001
    - CR-002
  - phase: Phase 2: Security
    tasks: 
    - CR-003
  - phase: Phase 3: Backend
    tasks: 
    - CR-004
    - CR-005
  - phase: Phase 4: Frontend
    tasks: 
    - CR-006
  - phase: Phase 5: Integration
    tasks: 
    - CR-007
    - CR-008
```
